headline: Wall Street Analysts Think Boston Scientific (BSX) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Boston Scientific (BSX) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: Is Boston Scientific Corporation (BSX) One of the Best Medical Device Stocks to Invest in Right Now?
summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) is one of the best medical device stocks to invest in right now. Argus cut the price target on Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) to $95 from $115 on April 27, reaffirming a Buy rating on the shares.
